Bleed isn't bad it's just that no support for applying bleed specifically lol, but for Catena what matters for her is doing damage because after she exalts she converts the damage she deals to bleed at a 1:1 ratio

If you wanna support her support her damage
For her bleed is basically just a way of getting past boss invulnerability or just adding a second dose of the damage she did that turn that triggers after the enemy ends their turn

Hi!
I have C2 24 and wanna one more copy. Should I use my universal dupe from the shop or continue to pull on her banner?
universal dupe, it resets in a week anyways
you can also just save the dupe and continue to pull but that depends if you're feeling lucky
You mean it will disappear from my inventory in a week?
Oh, I see
No it resets from shop in a week
so you can get a new one in a week
Universal dupes both character and wheel always reset monthly in the shop.
Does require you to pull get the currency for them but they're absolutely worth
Basically gives you a free enlighten which can help a LOT.

Yeah, that's why I try to figure out what I should do. On one side I can save dupe and use on any other limited character, but i gonna be short on pulls when new character arrives. On the other side I'm gonna use this dupe and save pulls 🤔
